a145bf6f8fe0ddc5c8daaece479e6f79.summary: Workshops at Service Design Global Conference 2026
a145bf6f8fe0ddc5c8daaece479e6f79.description: Workshops held as part of the Service Design Global Conference 2026 (SDGC26) on 28 October. These workshops require separate purchase once registration opens. They are offered both in-person in Wiesbaden, Germany and online.

285317a345d9a8487145649b95d7e955.summary: International Conference on Nonprofit Management and Social Innovation-ICNMSI
285317a345d9a8487145649b95d7e955.description: International Conference on Nonprofit Management and Social Innovation-ICNMSI

a1c8d7afbf37a604f37e15de0333e97c.description: The III European (Local) Public Innovation Conference welcomes contributions that advance reflection, research, and practice in innovation in and through local governments. Core thematic areas include Diversity and Inclusion, Environmental Sustainability, and Citizenship and Participation. Cross-cutting themes also cover mission-oriented innovation, digital transformation in local public administration, capacity-building, HEI–municipality collaboration, and foresight/future-fit public sector capabilities. Contributions must be written in English, while presentations may be delivered in English or Portuguese.
